itemListElement.name: Custom Cocktail Napkins
itemListElement.description: Custom cocktail napkins (3.94 in folded) for bars, parties, hospitality, weddings, and brand activations. Airlaid, Doble Punto, 3-ply, 2-ply.

itemListElement.name: Custom Wedding & Event Napkins
itemListElement.description: Wedding-grade cocktail and dinner napkins with foil, custom shapes, and luxury finishes for ceremonies, receptions, welcome parties.

itemListElement.name: Custom Napkins with Logo
itemListElement.description: Logo-printed napkins for agencies, corporate brands, merchandising, restaurant identity, and hospitality programs.

itemListElement.name: Custom Printed Napkins
itemListElement.description: Full-color digital print on cocktail, beverage, and dinner napkins for events, brands, restaurants, hotels, and private clients.

itemListElement.name: Personalized Napkins
itemListElement.description: Small-batch personalized napkins for birthdays, anniversaries, private events, weddings, brands, and residences. Names, initials, dates, logos, monograms.

itemListElement.name: Custom Restaurant & Bar Napkins
itemListElement.description: Branded napkins for restaurant groups, bars, lounges, cafés, hospitality groups, and private buyouts.

itemListElement.name: Custom Restaurant Napkins
itemListElement.description: Disposable dinner and beverage napkins for restaurant service, restaurant groups, hospitality groups, and seasonal programs.

itemListElement.name: Custom Hotel Napkins
itemListElement.description: Branded hospitality napkins for hotel bars, room service, lobby bars, banquets, suites, and private dining.

itemListElement.name: Custom Yacht Napkins
itemListElement.description: Branded napkins for yacht crews, charter companies, vessels, and maritime hospitality. Family crests, vessel names, private collections.

itemListElement.name: Custom Napkins for Event Planners
itemListElement.description: Wholesale custom napkins for event planners and production companies. Airlaid, Doble Punto, 3-ply, 2-ply with logos, monograms, crests, or artwork.

itemListElement.name: Custom Napkins for Agencies
itemListElement.description: White-label custom napkin manufacturing for creative and marketing agencies. Brand activations, product launches, press dinners, client events.

itemListElement.name: Custom Event Napkins
itemListElement.description: Branded napkins for galas, conferences, festivals, and corporate events.

itemListElement.name: Corporate Event Napkins
itemListElement.description: Branded napkins for corporate launches, employee events, brand activations, conferences, hospitality programs, and VIP dinners.

itemListElement.name: Custom Beverage Napkins
itemListElement.description: Branded napkins for bar programs, lounges, pool bars, country clubs, beverage service, wine programs, coffee service, and dessert bars.

itemListElement.name: Airlaid Napkins
itemListElement.description: Premium custom airlaid napkins with linen-like feel. Cocktail, dinner, kangaroo fold with cutlery pocket, and 1/8 fold guest towel.

itemListElement.name: Foil Stamp Napkins
itemListElement.description: Hot stamp foil printing in 37 Pantone-matched colors. Metallic (gold, rose gold, silver, copper), holographic, pigment, and matte foil families.
